test.command: pnpm -C "/Users/aischool/work/papierklammer_droid" exec vitest run ui/src/ packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3

blockingIssues.description: App.tsx computes middle content with `rows - 5` (`fixedBarHeight = 5`) instead of the contracted `rows - 3`.
HeaderBar does not have an explicit fixed height despite VAL-TUI-STAB-001 requiring fixed heights for header/input/status bars.
MessageList resize behavior clamps scroll offset instead of resetting scroll offset as specified by the feature contract.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Ink testing-library note to .factory/library/testing.md covering missing `stdout.rows` defaults, explicit rows getter setup, and resize event pattern for TUI layout tests.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify and enforce the `tui-worker` 'Write tests FIRST' rule with objective adherence criteria (or relax wording if intended) and require accurate `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` when edits precede tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both tui-layout-stability and tui-message-flow-fix review transcripts show code edits before new tests, while one handoff still reported followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TUI layout contracts involving terminal rows versus Ink border overhead so requirements like '1-row fixed bars' and middle-area formulas are unambiguous and testable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: tui-layout-stability review found contract divergence (`rows - 3` required vs implementation accounting for border rows), indicating ambiguity between design intent and Ink rendering semantics.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate skill-adherence observation for tui-worker TDD order from multiple reviewers.
